parameters: ("Are you insane Sandman?\. You purposely got hit by the horse
so you could be thrown onto the rock?!")
"Your arrows!\| Shoot him with your arrows!"
"(They couldn't fire in time. He's too quick!)"
"(\|.\|.\|.Where did you run to?\..\..\.. Can someone like
you really be from the same tribe as me?)"
"Please stop it sis!\. I'm sorry!\. I'm really sorry sis!\.
"We're going back now !\. Together!\. I'll apologize with
you!\. You'll promise the elder and the chief and everyone
that you won't read the white man's books anymore!"
"Apologize, and tell them that you didn't mean to insult the
"...Big sis,\. that's where our opinions differ."
"The white man is the enemy, yes,\. but understanding your
enemy's culture is another way to overcome them."
"Our tribe's way of thinking won't work in this time.\.
Everybody thinks we're being hounded from this land, but\..\..\.."
"The white man's basic concept is 'money'.\. The "land of
our ancestor's" doesn't exist anymore.\. There's no such
thing.\. This place belongs to the person who owns it.\. Who
"\..\..\..You've been that way since you were a kid. Once you
made a decision, you refused to cooperate with anyone who
"That's why nobody ever understands what you're thinking."
"Big sis, let me show you something."
"Is there something you're trying to tell me?"
"I happened across these two weeks ago."
"Did someone carve them out?\. Scrape them out?\| How did they
"Each of these pits is a perfect sphere\.. Whoever made these
would have to scrape at an incredible speed with impossible
precision to make so many of them."
"I also found some of the white mans' books here."
"This was done by a white man?!\.\. You never said they
"Take it easy...\| This guy was alone.\. He wasn't
looking to steal anything or search for gold mines.\. He's
"He was training here.\. In this wasteland."
"We also seclude ourselves in the mountains to train our
hunting skills, don't we?\. I can tell by the tracks\..\..\..
"Running through this place again and again\..\..\.. Look at them.
"Amazing...\. He could reach so high in just one leap!"
"I just realized. He was running with something in his
hands.\. I can tell by the marks."
"Is that it?\. Is that what scraped the holes in these
"Just what are you trying to tell me?"
"Big sis\..\..\.. \| It's good you found me here...\. I
"I won't be coming back to the village..."
(Sandman pulls out some kind of paper.\.\.)
"This is a newspaper.\. Can you read it?"
"It says ''Steel Ball Run' Race Opening...\. prize money will
be given to the winner'. You know how much?\..\..\.."
"Enough of the white man's money to buy this wasteland!"
"Our land since the era of our ancestors!"
